Read More

The Arch Design Award celebrates excellence and innovation across the creative disciplines that shape our built and visual environment. The program recognises remarkable achievements in Architectural Design, Interior Design, Furniture and Product Design, Lighting Design, and Packaging and Graphic Design. Open to designers, studios, and creative professionals worldwide, the award honours projects that push boundaries, elevate everyday experiences, and inspire through design. Winners establish their reputation on an international stage, gaining visibility that strengthens their professional and creative journey.

Q: What is ARCH-ID and how can I get it?
A: ARCH-ID is a personal code, it helps to identify the Designers and the Submitted Designs. You will receive your ARCH-ID within 3 business days after you purchased a Registration Ticket.
 

Q: I have a Registration Ticket, can I submit my Design later?
A: Yes, of course! You will be allowed to submit your project at any time, before the final submission deadline: 05 March 2025, 24:00 GMT+3. Please note, the registration fees are constantly increasing during the different registration periods, we advise you to buy the Registration Ticket(s) at a discounted price in advance as you can submit your Design later.

Q: Are there any extra fees for the Winners to receive the Winners' Kit?
A: There are no hidden costs and expenses in Arch Design Award. The Early, Standard Late and Final Registration Tickets include everything except the Exclusive Crystal Glass Trophy.

The Mission

The arch has been a recurring symbol and element in architecture all around the World for thousands of years. The history of arches can be traced back to ancient civilizations. This structure still widely used today and connecting us to our rich architectural heritage while pushing us forward into new, innovative forms. It is a deceptive simple but structurally crucial element, a visual bridge between inside and outside.

The mission of the Arch Design Award is to highlight the most interesting, well-designed, and innovative solutions across the fields of Architectural Design, Interior Design, Furniture and Product Design, Lighting Design, Packaging and Graphic Design Categories. The Arch Design Award honours talented designers and studios whose work reflects creativity, quality, and forward-thinking vision. Receiving this recognition can be a meaningful step in a designer’s career, enhancing reputation and visibility within the global design community.

Award Levels

Arch
Design
Award '26

The Arch Design Award rewards the designs at three levels: Bronze, Silver, Golden. Bronze Arch Design Award highlights projects have great design values in addition to functionality and appropriate use of materials, integration into the environment. Silver Arch Design Award goes to the projects have amazing design ideas, functionality, innovative solutions, great integration and market values. Golden Arch Design Award will be awarded for the projects have excellent design, flawless functional solutions, innovative and contemporary use of materials and green technologies, outstanding artistic and market values. Bronze, Silver and Golden Design Award Winners are excellent professionals who deserve international attention and recognition for their designs. The Arch Design Award provides a platform for architects and designers to showcase their work to a global audience. Winning this award can be a significant boost to their career, as it helps to enhance their reputation and visibility in the industry.

The members of Arch Design Award Jury were selected from a wide range of applications. The Jury Members are internationally recognised experts, highly experienced, award-winning professionals from around the world in the field of Architecture and Interior Design. The Jury Members do not know any personal information about the Designers, the blind judging process allows everyone to stand on equal terms and with equal chances. The Jury Members vote on different aspects: Design, Functionality, Structures and Materials, Innovation and Sustainability, Market Value, Presentation. Jury Members give between 1 and 10 points for each aspect, which will be weighted for the final score. The degree of score weighting is proportional to the importance of the aspects: Design: 35%, Functionality: 20% Structures and Materials: 15%, Innovation and Sustainability: 10%, Market Value: 5%, Presentation: 15%. The final Design Score is an average weighted score by the Jury Members. Bronze Arch Design Award Design Score: 7,0-7,9. Silver Arch Design Award Design Score: 8,0-8,9. Golden Arch Design Award Design Score: 9,0-10,0. Arch Design Award 2026 Winners will be published on 01 April 2026, 12:00 GMT+3.

Winners' Kit

Digital Publication on Arch Design Award Website

The Award-Winning Designs will be published on the Arch Design Award website. You will have a beautifully designed dedicated page that you can share with your customers, friends, relatives. This benefit is available for Bronze, Silver, Golden Arch Design Award Winners in Architectural Design Category and Interior Design Category after the annual Winners' Announcement.

Digital Arch Design Award Winner Certificate

Arch Design Award Winners will receive a high resolution digital Award Winner Certificate. You can print this certificate by yourself in any size: A4, A3, A2 or use it on your website, social media platforms.


This benefit is available for Bronze, Silver, Golden Arch Design Award Winners in Architectural Design Category and Interior Design Category after the annual Winners' Announcement.

Digital Arch Design Award Winner Logos and Banners

Arch Design Award Winners will receive digital Award Winner Logos and Banners. These are available in different colors with multiple backgrounds. You are able to use these Winner Logos and Banners on your website, social media platforms, publications, marketing materials. This benefit is available for Bronze, Silver, Golden Arch Design Award Winners in Architectural Design Category and Interior Design Category after the Winners' Announcement.

License to use Arch Design Award Winner Logos and Banners

Arch Design Award Winners will receive digital Award Winner Logos and Banners. These are available in different colors with multiple backgrounds. You are able to use these Winner Logos and Banners on your website, social media platforms, publications, marketing materials. This benefit is available for Bronze, Silver, Golden Arch Design Award Winners in Architectural Design Category and Interior Design Category after the annual Winners' Announcement.

Metal Arch Design Award Trophy

The dimensions of the Arch Design Award Trophies are 25 x 25 x 25 mm and made by 90% recycled metals (brass, stainless steel, copper) with a multiple axes precision CNC milling technology while achieving tolerances as small as ±0.005 mm. The Trophies have high tensile strength, ductility, wear and corrosion resistance at high temperatures. Exceptionally shiny and smooth surface finishes thanks to the handmade high quality polishing. Winners will receive the Trophies in a beautiful black and light grey display box.


The materials are different in every award levels: Golden Arch Design Award Winner Trophy: brass Silver Arch Design Award Winner Trophy: stainless steel Bronze Arch Design Award Winner Trophy: copper This benefit is available for Bronze, Silver, Golden Arch Design Award Winners in Architectural Design Category and Interior Design Category after the annual Winners' Announcement.

Right to purchase the Exclusive Crystal Glass Arch Design Award Trophy

The Arch Design Award Winners have the right to purchase the Exclusive Crystal Glass Trophy after the annual Winners' Announcement. The Trophy body is made by black and transparent high quality crystal glass blocks with the engraved 3D silhouette of the iconic Arch Design Award logo. The Trophy label is made by black acrylic and printed the award level, award year, design category, designer name, design title on it. The dimensions of the Exclusive Crystal Glass Trophy are 55 x 55 x 230 mm and its total weight is 1800 g.The handmade and hand polished Trophies are arriving with a satin pouch bag in a black presentation box. The retail price is 250 EUR / Trophy* whichincludes free international shipping. This is a perfect decor object to represent the achieved success and can be a thoughtful gift to your colleagues and clients.






This benefit is available for Bronze, Silver, Golden Arch Design Award Winners in Architectural Design Category and Interior Design Category after the annual Winners' Announcement.

DAA - Design Award Agency Membership

Arch Design Award Winners will receive a free membership by DAA - Design Award Agency. You can submit your Portfolio on www.designawardagency.com website and enjoy the additional membership benefits provided by DAA. This benefit is available for Bronze, Silver, Golden Arch Design Award Winners in Architectural Design Category and Interior Design Category after the annual Winners' Announcement.

Premium Marketing Package by DAA - Design Award Agency

Arch Design Award Winners will receive a free Premium Marketing Package (normal fee: 300 EUR) which includes: DAA Membership, Portfolio Submission: 1-3 Projects / Designs, Digital Certificate, License to use Membership Logos and Banners, Chance to be the Designer of the Month, Customer Support, Interview, Design News & Insights Article. This benefit is available for Bronze, Silver, Golden Arch Design Award Winners in Architectural Design Category and Interior Design Category after the annual Winners' Announcement.

Interview on DAA - Design Award Agency website

Arch Design Award Winners will receive an Exclusive Interview by DAA - Design Award Agency on www.designawardagency.com website. With this written interview we would like to get to know better your creative philosophy and your future plans. This benefit is available for Bronze, Silver, Golden Arch Design Award Winners in Architectural Design Category and Interior Design Category after the annual Winners' Announcement.

Digital Arch Design Award Participation Certificate

Designers who has been submitted a Design but not received a Bronze, Silver or Golden Design Award will receive a high resolution digital Arch Design Award Participation Certificate. You can print this certificate by yourself in any size: A4, A3, A2 or use it on your website, social media platforms. This benefit is available after the annual Winners' Announcement for every Designer who has been submitted a Project in Arch Design Award and not received a Bronze, Silver or Golden Design Award.

How to Apply

How to Apply

STEP 1.

Please, visit the "Registration" page and choose an available Registration Ticket for submission. Please note, the registration fees are constantly increasing during the different registration periods, we advise you to buy the Registration Ticket(s) at a discounted price in advance as you can upload your Design later.

STEP 2.

You will receive your ARCH-ID after the successful payment within 3 business days by E-Mail. Please, use your ARCH-ID during the submission process.

STEP 3.

Please, visit the "Submit" page and fill all the necessary information. Review your work carefully, make sure that the entries are submitted correctly before finalizing.
You can submit your Design at any time before the final submission deadline: 05 March 2026, 24:00 GMT+3.

FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

​

 

​
 

Q: Who is the organizer of Arch Design Award?
A: Arch Design Award managed and organized by a Finland based registered advertising and marketing agency: DAA-Design Award Agency (Business ID: 3148527-4, VAT ID: FI31485274).


Q: What are the Award Categories?
A: Architectural Design Category, Interior Design Category, Lighting Design Category, Furniture and Product Design Category, Packaging and Graphic Design Category.


Q: What kind of project fits into the Architectural Design Category?
A: The field of Architecture is more focused on the building’s technical requirements such as its form, structure of the building that includes the placement of spaces, the material to be used, the climate, lighting, flooring, ventilation, the relationship between the building and its surroundings. The functionality, the use of recycled materials, the use of renewable energies, and the avoidance of wasteful architectural solutions are essential today and and will be even more important in the future. Energy codes around the world get stricter every year, architects need to prepare for various challenges ahead.


Q: What kind of design fits into the Interior Design Category?
A: Every building has an embedded story behind its walls. Traditionally, the design of the interior fell on the architect as well. Some notable 20th century architects, like Frank Lloyd Wright, put equal effort into the interiors as they did exteriors, creating buildings which were fascinating both to look at and occupy. The field of Interior Designing is focused on human psychology as well as the emotional aspects of a space. Interior architecture focuses on the functionality of a space for human occupancy. Interior design is a composition of other disciplines like arts and science in fulfilling the creation of the inner spaces.


Q: What are the Award Levels in Arch Design Award?
A: The Arch Design Award rewards the Designs at three levels in Architectural Design and Interior Design category: Bronze, Silver, Golden. Bronze Arch Design Award highlights projects have great design values in addition to functionality and appropriate use of materials, integration into the environment. Silver Arch Design Award goes to the projects have amazing design ideas, functionality, innovative solutions, great integration and market values. Golden Arch Design Award will be
